Interface KeYGuiExtension.KeyboardShortcuts

All Known Implementing Classes:
KeyboardShortcutAdapter, TestExtension, TestgenExtension
Enclosing interface:
KeYGuiExtension
public static interface KeYGuiExtension.KeyboardShortcuts
Extension Point for defining keyboard shortcuts for various components.
